title: lathyrus occidentalis f. cirrhosus
intro: Lathyrus occidentalis f. cirrhosus, also known as the Western sweetpea or cirrhosa sweetpea, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the pea family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and sedative effects. The health benefits of Lathyrus occidentalis f. cirrhosus include relief from anxiety and insomnia, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce muscle spasms. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote relaxation and improve overall well-being.
